Interface IStatisticsRequest2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to additional properties describing a request for statistics.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("6580A736-FD1E-4333-B0FF-9FCCBFB3F4CD")]
public interface IStatisticsRequest2 : IStatisticsRequest
